title: Calm Corner Cards
description: A self-regulation game where kids pick calm-down tools and practice slow balloon breathing.
learningGoals: Identify calming strategies for big feelings
Practice slow breathing and body settling
Treat calm tools as helpful choices rather than right-or-wrong answers
interactionModel: choose-one tap any calm tool or balloon card after a spoken scenario
feedbackModel: Every tool card is accepted, sparkles, and plays a brief guided calming practice line.
credits: Shared character portraits and emoji placeholder tool art. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
